channel.title: Posts on etCodes
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on etCodes

item.title: Corals Api
item.description: How To Build an API with Python FastAPI Introduction FastAPI is a relatively new and trending Python web framework for building APIs. Why FastAPI is faster? One of the main reasons FastAPI is faster, is that it utlizies Asyncronous Gateway Interface (ASGI) instead of Web Server Gateway Interface(WSGI). WSGI is a long-standing Python standard for compatibility between web servers, frameworks, and applications, which is in the process of being replaced as the standard to ASGI.
